
# robots.txt for security-recipes.ai
# Generated by Hugo at build time.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /search/
Disallow: /tags/null/
Disallow: /tags/Null/

# AI / LLM crawlers — explicitly allowed.
# This site is a public recipe library *intended* to be reached by
# agents. Allowing these crawlers improves discoverability inside
# AI assistants (Google AI Overviews, Perplexity citations, ChatGPT
# browse, Claude's citation surface). `Disallow:` with an empty
# value is robots.txt for "allow everything for this user-agent."
#
# To block any of these instead, change `Disallow:` to `Disallow: /`
# on the relevant line.
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow:

User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow:

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow:

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Disallow:

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow:

User-agent: cohere-ai
Disallow:

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow:

# Sitemap (Hugo auto-generates this at the site root).
Sitemap: https://security-recipes.ai/sitemap.xml

# Host hint (Yandex). Modern Google ignores this; harmless to keep.
Host: security-recipes.ai/hsecurity-recipes.ai/tsecurity-recipes.ai/tsecurity-recipes.ai/psecurity-recipes.ai/:security-recipes.ai//security-recipes.ai//security-recipes.ai
